message:
feat(c_interop): Add dlopen stub generation for C extension modules

- Add generateCExtensionStub() to generate Zig code that loads .so files
- Detect C extensions (.cpython-312-darwin.so) in import scanner
- Derive full module names from file paths (numpy._core._multiarray_umath)
- Generate stubs in .metal0/gen/ with proper directory structure
- Export PyObject_GetAttrString and PyObject_Call from c_interop
- Add projectZigPathFromRelative() for stub output paths

Stubs use std.DynLib.open() and dlsym to call PyInit_<module>,
allowing numpy's C extensions to link against our c_interop C API
reimplementation (2443 symbols) without libpython.
